title: Temple of Ichai Ghosh
tagline: Temple of Ichai Ghosh — spiritual town of West Bengal

heroImage.alt: Temple of Ichai Ghosh, West Bengal

overview.short: Ichhai Ghosher Deul is located near Gourangapur in the Indian state of West Bengal.
overview.description: Ichhai Ghosher Deul is located near Gourangapur in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is a late mediaeval brick-reinforced temple of the sikhara type without any image. Tradition says that Ichai Ghosh constructed the temple in honour of the Goddess Bhagabati. Notwithstanding, this type of brick temple seen at Neiba Khera, Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Gourangapur
topPlaces.description: Gourangapur is a village in Kanksa CD block in Durgapur subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The place has links with Ichhai Ghosh, king of Gopbhum, and it is believed that his capital, Dhekur, was located nearby.

topPlaces.name: Garh Jungle
topPlaces.description: Garh Jungle is an important place in Hindu mythology, especially Shakta. It is located in the Kanksa CD block of the Durgapur subdivision in Paschim Bardhaman district of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Jaydev Kenduli
topPlaces.description: Jaydev Kenduli is a village and gram panchayat in Illambazar community development block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum District in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is believed to be the birthplace of Jayadeva, an issue that is still debated by scholars.

topPlaces.name: Bankati, Paschim Bardhaman
topPlaces.description: Bankati is a village in Kanksa CD block in the Durgapur subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Sibpur, Paschim Bardhaman
topPlaces.description: Sibpur (also spelled Shibpur) is a village in Faridpur Durgapur CD block in the Durgapur subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Malandighi
topPlaces.description: Malandighi (also spelled Molandighi) is a village and a gram panchayat in Kanksa CD block in the Durgapur subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Ilambazar
topPlaces.description: Ilambazar is a census town, with a police station, in Ilambazar CD block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Kalikapur Rajbari
topPlaces.description: Kalikapur Rajbari also called Saat Mahala Bari (transl. সাত মহলা বাড়ি) is a large historic mansion with seven parts. It is a heritage palace in Kalikapur, in Purba Burdhaman district.

items.note: Gourangapur is a village in Kanksa CD block in Durgapur subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The place has links with Ichhai Ghosh, king of Gopbhum, and it is believed that his capital, Dhekur, was located nearby.
Garh Jungle is an important place in Hindu mythology, especially Shakta. It is located in the Kanksa CD block of the Durgapur subdivision in Paschim Bardhaman district of West Bengal.

Malandighi (also spelled Molandighi) is a village and a gram panchayat in Kanksa CD block in the Durgapur subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.
Ilambazar is a census town, with a police station, in Ilambazar CD block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal.
Kalikapur Rajbari also called Saat Mahala Bari (transl. সাত মহলা বাড়ি) is a large historic mansion with seven parts. It is a heritage palace in Kalikapur, in Purba Burdhaman district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Temple of Ichai Ghosh?
faq.a: The best time to visit Temple of Ichai Ghosh is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Temple of Ichai Ghosh?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (147 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Temple of Ichai Ghosh?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Temple of Ichai Ghosh at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Temple of Ichai Ghosh?
faq.a: Stays in Temple of Ichai Ghosh start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Temple of Ichai Ghosh?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gourangapur, Garh Jungle, Jaydev Kenduli, Bankati, Paschim Bardhaman, Sibpur, Paschim Bardhaman.
